<MethodEndpoint

Create a new meshProjectRole with specified permissions and rank

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshprojectrole.v1.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshpaymentmethods486549215"},"examples":{"meshProjectRoleV1Post":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v1\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshProjectRole\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"name\": \"project-viewer\",\n    \"tags\": {\n      \"priority\": [\"low\"],\n      \"access\": [\"read\"]\n    }\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"name\": \"Project Viewer\",\n    \"description\": \"Read-only access to project resources\",\n    \"rank\": 10\n  }\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"201","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshprojectrole.v1.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshProjectRoleV1Post","type":"object"},"examples":{"meshProjectRoleV1Post":{"value":"{\n  \"kind\" : \"meshProjectRole\",\n  \"apiVersion\" : \"v1\",\n  \"metadata\" : {\n    \"name\" : \"project-viewer\",\n    \"tags\" : {\n      \"priority\" : [ \"low\" ],\n      \"access\" : [ \"read\" ]\n    }\n  },\n  \"spec\" : {\n    \"name\" : \"Project Viewer\",\n    \"description\" : \"Read-only access to project resources\",\n    \"rank\" : 10\n  },\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshprojectroles/project-viewer\"\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
